text: hey, quick question - is there any known issue with the API documentation? coz it's kinda confusing right now.
I tried logging in, but it says my password is wrong. I can’t remember changing it though.

Hey, I'm having a bit of trouble. My account got locked, I can’t log in at all. The verification SMS isn’t coming through. I’m not sure if it’s my phone or your system. Just switched my number last week, that might be the issue.

Hello support team! I have been experiencing an issue with my account. Whenever I try to log in, I'm greeted with an error message that says my credentials are incorrect. However, I've double-checked and I'm certain I’m using the right details. Additionally, I also noticed that the last time I successfully logged in was a while ago, maybe two weeks back, around the time I was trying to access some reports for my project. Can you please assist me in resolving this issue? Thank you!
I ordered a gift for my sister's birthday, and it's late! Really upset since it was supposed to arrive last week.
Hey, quick question - is it possible to get the API response in XML format instead of JSON? I thought it was only JSON but someone mentioned XML might be an option.
Hey, really upset. Ordered my stuff weeks ago, received the wrong item. No one replying to me. Just want what I paid for!
I'm really upset because I ordered two shirts, but only one arrived. I just want my money back for the missing one. This is frustrating!

I’m really frustrated because my order was supposed to arrive yesterday, and I saw on the tracking it’s still sitting at the warehouse. Plus, I was promised a gift with purchase that I haven’t received, and it’s just annoying.
Hey there! I’m a bit stressed out because I’m not sure if the API supports pagination for large datasets or if I’m just doing something wrong? Would appreciate any guidance on this!
Hey, so I was using the app and it keeps crashing whenever I try to upload a photo. Super frustrating! Also, I wish it had a dark mode option. Can you help?

I thought I had enabled two-factor authentication, but it's just not working! It's been so frustrating not being able to access my account for days now. I definitely need help, or am I just missing something obvious?

I've been experiencing a recurring issue where the application fails to load certain features, particularly the analytics dashboard. I've tried multiple browsers and cleared my cache, but the problem persists. Has anyone else encountered this? It's quite frustrating, as I rely heavily on this tool for my daily reporting.
I ordered a shirt and a pair of shoes, but only the shoes came. Can I get my money back for the shirt instead of waiting for it to arrive? That doesn't seem right.

Dear Support Team, I am experiencing an issue where the software fails to load any of the plugin options despite multiple attempts to refresh. This has halted my workflow, and I would appreciate your guidance on resolving this matter.
I'm having trouble connecting to the server. It keeps timing out.
I got charged but my order isn't here. Can I get a refund?

Hey, I ordered a couple of things but just got one in the box. Can you help me get my money back for the one that didn't come? Also, I thought there would be a free gift with my order, but nothing was included.
I can't believe how frustrating this is! My product arrived damaged, and I've tried reaching out multiple times, but no one seems to care. It's like I'm talking to a wall. So disappointing!
I just want to ask, is the API rate limiting really a thing? It feels like it sometimes, but I can't find any info on it.
